simulator_config_json.narrative: There are 22 competing listings in the area. At the current sales rate of 1.0 per month, this represents 22.0 months of supply. At the asking price of R 1 150 000 you face 10 competing listings priced at or below, an estimated 11-month wait, and R 111 419 in holding costs — netting R 906 331 after commission and transfer. Pricing at the CMA middle of R 1 459 000 reduces competition to 18 listings, sells in ~12 months, and nets R 1 169 667 — saving R 10 129 in holding costs.
